audience: Founders, presales architects, and implementation engineers
business_goal: Answer methodology and client-delivery questions with cited internal knowledge and controlled tool use.

rag_pipeline.decision: Classify intent and rewrite ambiguous bilingual questions.
rag_pipeline.mechanism: Tier-3 classifier plus deterministic language detection.

rag_pipeline.decision: Use hybrid vector plus keyword retrieval with ACL filters.
rag_pipeline.mechanism: Qdrant hybrid search with metadata filters and reciprocal rank fusion.

rag_pipeline.decision: Re-rank, deduplicate, and preserve source provenance.
rag_pipeline.mechanism: Cross-encoder re-rank plus citation budget per source family.

rag_pipeline.decision: Route synthesis to a model tier based on complexity and risk.
rag_pipeline.mechanism: Policy router with escalation when retrieval confidence is low.

rag_pipeline.decision: Block unsupported claims and high-risk tool actions.
rag_pipeline.mechanism: Grounding check, citation verification, PII mask, and tool whitelist.

model_tiers.use_case: architecture synthesis and high-risk proposal reasoning
model_tiers.trigger: high complexity or low retrieval confidence

model_tiers.use_case: standard Q&A, summarization, and draft expansion
model_tiers.trigger: normal complexity and grounded evidence present

model_tiers.use_case: routing, extraction, PII masking, and format validation
known safe answers and outage fallback

connectors.name: Document index
connectors.access_pattern: indexed retrieval with source ACL preservation

connectors.name: CRM
connectors.fallback: omit CRM context and mark answer degraded

evidence.security_requirement: confidential internal knowledge with connector ACLs
